# Skills Directory - DO NOT EDIT

**WARNING: This directory is auto-generated by `bin/sync-skills.sh`**

Any changes made here will be **overwritten** on the next sync.

## How to Add or Modify Skills

All skill changes must be made in the canonical source:

```
modules/Autonom8-Agents/skills/
```

After making changes, run:

```bash
bin/sync-skills.sh
```

This will sync skills to all provider directories:
- `.claude/skills/`
- `.codex/skills/` (this directory)
- `.cursor/skills/`

## Skill Format

Skills use the Agent Skills standard:
- Folder structure: `skill-name/SKILL.md`
- YAML frontmatter with `name` and `description` fields

Example:
```yaml
---
name: my-skill
description: Brief description of what this skill does (max 500 chars)
---

# my-skill - Full Title

Detailed instructions...
```

## Documentation

See `go-autonom8/WED_SKILLS_CHANGELOG.md` for skill changelog.
